steps.title: Use custom regression for the coefficient
steps.content: For a linear equation to have no solution, the $x$-coefficients must match while the constants differ. Enter $x_1=[1]$ in Desmos and type $2kx_1\sim-\frac{28}{15}x_1$. Desmos returns $k=-\frac{14}{15}$.

steps.title: Check the contradiction
steps.content: With this $k$, the $x$-terms cancel. The constants are $-2n$ and $-\frac{36}{19}$. Since $n>1$, $2n>2>\frac{36}{19}$, so the constants cannot be equal. That leaves a false statement, which is exactly the no-solution condition. The answer is -0.9333.
